Where veggies meet their bold side

Where veggies meet their bold side
Experience True Authentic Indian Dining

See the Menu
Serving Metro Atlanta since 1998
Here fresh vegetables get in touch with their bold side with spices and aromas rich in tamarind, ginger, mustard seeds, cloves, cardamom…we use it all! Whether for an exotic, romantic dinner or a buffet luncheon with friends, family or co-workers, Madras Mantra is your irresistible choice for authentic Indian Cuisine!
STAYING IN TONIGHT? - ORDER DELIVERY OR TAKEOUT

More Info
LUNCH BUFFET EVERY DAY
Included in our beautiful lunch buffet are various kinds of rice, bread, curries, and more with many dishes both hot and cold. You will discover that our buffet is often a feast of celebration as we tailor our offerings to famous Indian festivals.
Now serving the buffet at ALL locations
Having a Party? WE CAter too!
